channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 🐘 mnapoli/vibephp (137 ⭐)
item.description:

👤 Owner: wellcms

📝 Repository: wellcms/wellcmsV3

📄 Descrizione: WellCMS 3.0 is a major milestone release, featuring a complete ground-up rewrite of the core framework. Built with a modern architecture, it delivers improved performance, scalability, and maintainability while preserving the lightweight design and efficiency that define WellCMS. Faster, cleaner, and more extensible than ever before.
